name: Meitu Eco-Friendly High Glossy Interior Wall Paint
file: Meitu Eco-Friendly High Glossy Interior Wall Paint.webp
src: /Regular/interior/Meitu Eco-Friendly High Glossy Interior Wall Paint.webp
leadtext: Meitu’s eco-friendly high glossy interior wall paint combines luxurious aesthetics with environmental responsibility. Its smooth, reflective surface enhances the brightness and depth of any room, creating a modern and sophisticated look. The paint is low in VOCs and odor-free, making it ideal for indoor use where health and comfort are priorities. Additionally, the washable and easy-to-maintain surface ensures that walls stay beautiful and vibrant for years. Perfect for living rooms, hallways, and accent walls, this interior paint adds a premium high-gloss finish to any space.

name: Meitu Eco-Friendly High Glossy Natural Interior Wall Paint
file: Meitu Eco-Friendly High Glossy Natural Interior Wall Paint.webp
src: /Regular/interior/Meitu Eco-Friendly High Glossy Natural Interior Wall Paint.webp
leadtext: A high-gloss finish interior paint that gives walls a shiny, luminous surface with strong light reflection. This type of paint enhances brightness and makes colours look richer and more vibrant. Its smooth, reflective quality also makes cleaning easier, as dust and marks can be wiped off more readily. It’s ideal for accent walls, hallways, and modern interior themes where a polished, upscale look is desired.

name: Meitu Eco-Friendly Dark Color Interior and Exterior Wall Paint
file: Meitu Eco-Friendly Dark Color Interior and Exterior Wall Paint.webp
src: /Regular/interior/Meitu Eco-Friendly Dark Color Interior and Exterior Wall Paint.webp
leadtext: Meitu Eco-friendly dark colour paint (dark base) is a speciality paint formulated to deliver deep, rich, and saturated dark tones while being gentle on the environment and indoor air quality. The “dark base” means the paint is specifically designed as a foundation for darker shades (like charcoals, deep blues, forest greens, dark browns, and black-based hues), providing excellent coverage and consistent depth of colour with fewer coats.
features: Low VOC / Safe for Air Quality

name: Meitu Eco-Friendly Interior Wall Paint
leadtext: Meitu Eco-friendly interior paints are designed to be better for both the environment and indoor health. They typically have low or zero VOCs, minimal odour, and may use natural or less toxic components, reducing harmful emissions and improving indoor air quality. These paints are suitable for sensitive environments — such as children’s rooms, bedrooms, offices, or living spaces — where cleaner air and safety are desirable.

name: Meitu Environmentally Friendly Constant Color Interior Wall Paint
file: Meitu Environmentally Friendly Constant Color Interior Wall Paint.webp
src: /Regular/interior/Meitu Environmentally Friendly Constant Color Interior Wall Paint.webp
leadtext: These paints are engineered to retain colour stability over time, meaning the hue stays consistent and less prone to fading even with exposure to sunlight, temperature changes, or everyday wear. They’re often formulated with high-quality pigments and binders that resist fading and help the walls look fresh and vivid for longer. This type is great for homes where long-lasting, true-to-tone colour performance is a priority.

name: Meitu Environmentally Friendly Natural Interior Wall Paint
file: Meitu Environmentally Friendly Natural Interior Wall Paint.webp
src: /Regular/interior/Meitu Environmentally Friendly Natural Interior Wall Paint.webp
leadtext: Meitu Natural interior wall paints are formulated with safer, more natural ingredients and often lower VOCs (volatile organic compounds). These paints aim to improve indoor air quality and reduce strong chemical odours, making them more comfortable and healthier for living spaces like bedrooms and family rooms. Their finishes can range from matte to soft sheen, with a subtle, warm, and natural look that complements a variety of interior styles.

name: Meitu Interior Wall Paint Ceiling White
file: Meitu Interior Wall Paint Ceiling White.webp
leadtext: Meitu Eco-Friendly Ceiling White Paint (non-gloss / standard finish) is a healthy, indoor-safe white ceiling paint that focuses on clean air quality and smooth appearance rather than high shine. It uses water-based, eco-friendly formulation with low odour and reduced harmful emissions — ideal for spaces where a calm, uniform white look is desired. This paint creates a clean, bright white ceiling that helps make rooms appear larger and fresher, while being gentle on indoor air quality during and after application
